logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag for better cross-compilation support in Java 9+.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target settings to the unified release flag.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: The release flag is the standard way to specify Java version in JDK 9+ and ensures consistent compilation and runtime compatibility; while source/target might still work, release is the intended modern approach.
